data.title: CHIC 2026 Honors Landmark Deals and Financings at Annual Awards Gala
data.description: On April 1, 2026, the 12th Annual China Healthcare Investment Conference (CHIC 2026) concluded its first day at The Ritz-Carlton Hotel Pudong, Shanghai with an Awards Gala Dinner. This event marked the celebration with co-hosts including the Founding Platinum Sponsor.

data.title: GA technologies Rebrands "Renters Warehouse" as "RENOSY by Renters Warehouse" to Accelerate U.S. Growth
data.description: In Tokyo on April 1, 2026, GA technologies Co., Ltd. introduced its AI real estate investment service, "RENOSY." The company's headquarters is located in Minato-ku, Tokyo, with Ryo Higuchi serving as President and CEO. The stock code for GA Technologies is 3491. The initiative to rebrand "RENOSY" has been officially launched.

data.title: Piedmont Natural Gas files application for base rate adjustment in South Carolina
data.description: Piedmont Natural Gas recently submitted a request for a base rate increase and a reduction in natural gas cost rates. The distribution of these costs among residential, commercial, and industrial customers will be examined during the ongoing proceeding in Charlotte, North Carolina. The request was filed on April 1, 2026. This filing aims to address the financial needs of the company and potentially impact its customers.

data.title: Telix Appoints David Gill as Non-Executive Director
data.description: Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited has recently appointed David Gill as a Non-Executive Director (NED) as part of their Board expansion and succession plan. The appointment will be effective from May 11, 2026. Mr. Gill is anticipated to eventually assume the position of Chair, taking over from Dr. Mark Nelson, who will continue on the Board as a NED. Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited is listed on the ASX (TLX) and NASDAQ (TLX).

data.title: Aris Mining Stock, Franco-Nevada, HSBC Among 30 New Stocks On IBD Watchlists
data.description: Today, 30 new stocks have been added to the IBD stock lists, which include the IBD 50, IPO Leaders, and the IBD Big Cap 20. Some of the notable additions are Aris Mining Stock, Franco-Nevada, and HSBC. These growth stocks are garnering attention and have the potential for significant market performance. The inclusion of these stocks in the watchlists indicates their strength and growth prospects.

data.title: Tanabe Pharma America Announces Finalization of RADICAVA (edaravone) Transfer to Shionogi
data.description: Tanabe Pharma America, Inc. is concentrating on innovating solutions for rare diseases and meeting patient needs. The company, based in Jersey City, N.J., completed a significant development on April 1, 2026. Tanabe Pharma America is a subsidiary of Tanabe Pharma Corporation, emphasizing their commitment to addressing rare diseases.
